entities.name: V
entities.context: Approver who provides explicit sign-off in Phase 4

entities.name: PRD
entities.context: Product Requirements Document scored against rubric dimensions

entities.name: Phase 2 (Discovery)
entities.context: Earlier workflow phase to revisit when PRD has substantial gaps (<6.0)

entities.name: Phase 3 (Design)
entities.context: Workflow phase for improving PRD when scores are 6.0-7.9

entities.name: Phase 4 (Approval)
entities.context: Final workflow phase requiring V's explicit sign-off, triggered when score ≥8.0

entities.name: Rubric
entities.context: 10-point scoring system with multiple dimensions for evaluating PRD readiness

relationships.context: V provides explicit sign-off as gatekeeper for Phase 4
PRD is evaluated against rubric dimensions to determine readiness
Phase 4 follows Phase 3 in workflow sequence
Phase 3 follows Phase 2; low scores may require revisiting Phase 2
